prompt: Create a cozy soft hand-decorated sticker collage illustration in a warm beige journaling style. The canvas is vertical 3:4, like a scrapbook page on off-white paper with subtle grain and torn-paper textures. Center-right: an illustrated young woman with long wavy dark brown hair wearing an oversized ribbed beige sweater, sitting at a wooden table and holding a white cup of warm drink with both hands; keep her face intentionally simple or softly obscured, with no detailed facial features. Use cutout sticker edges around the woman, with slight paper shadow for a layered handmade look. Top-left: large elegant black handwritten script text reading Soft little moment. Beneath it, place a small torn cream note taped at the top with beige masking tape, containing typewriter-style text: A warm drink, a quiet place, and a little time for me.. Include exactly 8 decorative objects: 1 hanging potted trailing plant at the upper right on torn paper, 1 small grid paper scrap with masking tape at the upper right edge, 1 open wooden window on the lower left with muted greenery outside, 1 small potted leafy plant on the table near the window, 1 croissant on a white plate at the bottom left, 1 closed book or notebook at the bottom right with a blue cover panel and small daisy illustration, 1 pale green paper scrap partly visible at the bottom right, and 1 wooden tabletop spanning the bottom. Include exactly 5 small doodles: 3 heart doodles, 1 tiny flower doodle, and 1 warm peach heart accent. Color palette: cream, kraft paper brown, oatmeal beige, muted sage green, dark coffee brown, soft peach, and faded blue. Visual style: soft Korean sticker diary / hand-decorated journal aesthetic, flat watercolor-gouache illustration, paper cutout borders, masking tape, gentle shadows, calm cozy mood, clean composition with ample negative space. Avoid photorealism, harsh outlines, saturated colors, extra text, logos, or watermarks.
